title: love
content:
i posted this once on valentine's .. somehow, i feel like posting this again ...

"... love has nothing to  do with what you expect to get; it's what you are expecting to give - which is everything. what you will receive in return varies. but it really has no connection with what you give. you give because you love and cannot help giving. ..." - katherine hepburn

 **take good care of your love ones, while you can.**
